title: PROJECT LEMONADE - 211info
text: PROJECT LEMONADE PROJECT LEMONADE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Youth in foster care can get new or nearly new outfits, accessories, and shoes, which they get to choose themselves. 1008 Lloyd Center Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: Ages 5-20 in the ODHS Child Welfare system with an open case Hours: Tuesday-Friday 10am-5pm, Saturday 10am-1pm Email (503) 395-3976 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 395-3976 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website to make an appointment FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: None required at intake AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Children's Clothing * Foster Children If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
